The question asks for the only year when one side has won in the rivalry, and it must be both before 1900 and after 2000.

Looking at the table:
- The years listed are all between 1978 and 2013.
- None of the years are before 1900.
- The condition requiring a year to be both before 1900 and after 2000 cannot be satisfied since no year can simultaneously be before 1900 and after 2000.

Therefore, there is no valid year that meets both criteria.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the only year when one side has won in the rivalry, and it must be both before 1900 and after 2000. 
Looking at the rows provided in the table, all the years listed are between 1978 and 2013. Therefore, none of the years meet the criteria of being both before 1900 and after 2000.
